content.problemStatement:
For her birthday, Rima got an integer sequence A1,A2,…,ANA_1, A_2, \dots, A_NA1​,A2​,…,AN​. Each element of this sequence is either 1 or 2.

Let's call an integer sss (1≤s≤2N1 \le s \le 2N1≤s≤2N) a summary integer if there is a contiguous subsequence of AAA such that the sum of its elements is equal to sss.

Rima wants to count all the summary integers. Can you help her?
content.inputFormat:
The first line of the input contains a single integer TTT denoting the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
The first line of each test case contains a single integer NNN.
The second line contains NNN space-separated integers A1,A2,…,ANA_1, A_2, \dots, A_NA1​,A2​,…,AN​.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print a single line containing one integer — the number of summary integers.
